BaseReporterz?Delegate class to provider progress reporting for the resolver.c
z-Called before the resolution actually starts.N
selfr
D/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/pip/_vendor/resolvelib/reporters.py
starting
BaseReporter.startingc
zYCalled before each round of resolution starts.
        The index is zero-based.
        Nr
indexr
starting_round
BaseReporter.starting_roundc
Called before each round of resolution ends.
        This is NOT called if the resolution ends at this round. Use `ending`
        if you want to report finalization. The index is zero-based.
        Nr
stater
ending_round
BaseReporter.ending_roundc
z/Called before the resolution ends successfully.Nr
ending
BaseReporter.endingc
Called when adding a new requirement into the resolve criteria.
        :param requirement: The additional requirement to be applied to filter
            the available candidaites.
        :param parent: The candidate that requires ``requirement`` as a
            dependency, or None if ``requirement`` is one of the root
            requirements passed in from ``Resolver.resolve()``.
        Nr
requirement
parentr
adding_requirement
BaseReporter.adding_requirementc
z6Called when rejecting a candidate during backtracking.Nr
	candidater
backtracking!
BaseReporter.backtrackingc
z9Called when adding a candidate to the potential solution.Nr
pinning$
BaseReporter.pinningN)
